name: SAM Check Cashing Machine
description_short: At 1 Virginia Ave, Pittsburgh, PA 15211, SAM Check Cashing Machine can be reached at +1 412-432-7067.
description_long:
SAM Check Cashing Machine is a check-cashing service provider operating from a single location in Houston, Pennsylvania. The business is positioned as a convenient financial services point for customers needing quick access to cash and transaction services without traditional banking infrastructure.

Based on the available website information, SAM Check Cashing Machine provides core check-cashing services along with complementary financial transaction options. Their service offerings appear to include check cashing for personal and business checks, money order issuance, wire transfer facilitation, and bill payment processing—all traditional services designed for customers who need immediate cash access or transaction completion.

The company operates a straightforward physical location model, maintaining a single storefront in Houston, PA with direct phone contact available at (724) 745-0717. They provide location-based services rather than online or app-based transactions, which appeals to customers in their local service area who prefer in-person financial transactions.

For consumers evaluating SAM Check Cashing Machine, the primary consideration is location convenience—this is a single-location provider suitable only for Houston, PA residents or those passing through the area. The limited publicly available information suggests this is a traditional, local check-cashing operation without expanded digital services or multi-location convenience that larger chains offer. Customers should verify current hours, fee structures, and check-cashing limits before visiting, as these details are not available in the current web presence.
pros: Local, established physical location in Houston, PA with direct phone contact (724) 745-0717
Offers multiple transaction types (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment) in one location
In-person service available for customers preferring face-to-face financial transactions
Convenient W Pike Street location with confirmed business address: 2440 W Pike St, Houston, PA 15342
cons: Single-location business with no online or mobile app services; cannot serve customers remotely
No published fee schedule, APRs, or service terms visible on available web presence
Limited digital footprint makes it difficult to verify current hours, policies, or check-cashing limits before visiting
No information about check amount limits, identification requirements, or fee structures for different services
best_for: Houston, PA residents needing same-day check cashing without a bank account
Local customers requiring money orders, wire transfers, or bill payment in one transaction
Individuals who prefer in-person financial services and personal interaction
diagnosis: SAM Check Cashing Machine is best for Houston, PA residents and local customers needing immediate check cashing or money transfer services. The main caveat is that this single-location provider offers no online alternative, remote services, or accessible information about fees or service terms, requiring customers to call or visit in person for details.
